specific_mechanism: Physarum polycephalum slime-mold networks reorganize for shortest-path nutrient transport via tube-thickening feedback; networks reproduce Tokyo-rail-graph efficiency
llm_application: LLM agent task-routing optimized via Physarum-style tube-thickening: edge weights between agents adjust based on task-flow, recovering near-optimal routing without explicit graph algorithms.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes lichenology feedback-attenuation mapping as proposed.
